name: International Committee of the Red Cross

sources: States Party to the Geneva Conventions
National Red Cross and Red Crescent Societies

movement_partners.name: Red Cross and Red Crescent Movement

2026.methodology: Official 2026 Budget Appeal approved by the ICRC Assembly. Total amount is 2.29 billion US Dollars (USD), representing a 17% reduction compared to 2025. Spending breakdown follows the institutional efficiency target of 89/11 ratio between operations and support costs.

sources: State Parties to the Geneva Conventions
National Red Cross and Red Crescent Societies

movement_partners.name: Red Cross and Red Crescent Movement

2025.methodology: Data based on the ICRC Official Appeal 2025. The total budget of USD 2.76 billion is split between field operations (USD 2.41 billion) and headquarters (USD 308.6 million). Income is projected as voluntary contributions based on historical 90% implementation rates.

sources: National Red Cross and Red Crescent Societies

movement_partners.name: Red Cross and Red Crescent Movement

2024.methodology: Data based on the ICRC Annual Report 2024. Total income represents donor contributions of USD 2.59 billion. Spending is based on total expenditure of USD 2.44 billion, where USD 2.15 billion was allocated directly to field operations.
